intent: Sweep fixture (MED) for 1s_1br_wd_side_split_bath_ld -- 11x8 m lot, 28.0 m2 buildable floor. Round-number test point matching the gr sibling's med. This is the smaller of this topology's two feasible fixtures -- min (10x8) is deliberately left to the gr sibling; ldk is infeasible there (confirmed empirically, and structurally: requires ldk_horizontal to bypass the solver's default living-in-front-of-both LDK rule, which this side-by-side living/dining design doesn't satisfy).
